vendor: Oracle; SAP; PeopleSoft; JD Edwards; Baan; Lawson
lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Integrated ERP Application Suites (SAP S/4HANA, Oracle Fusion, Microsoft Dynamics 365) are actively developed and growing. Cloud ERP is the dominant trend.', 'source': 'General ERP market'}
notes: Fully integrated enterprise application suite; single data model; central subject of white paper; argued to deliver superior long-term ROI over point solutions.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Best-of-breed point solutions continue as a procurement strategy, particularly in MarTech and SaaS. The approach competes with integrated suite/platform approaches. Both models coexist actively.', 'source': 'General IT strategy'}
notes: Single-function enterprise software product; emerged in late 1990s; argued in paper to have higher integration costs and protracted ROI versus integrated suites.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'XML is a standard-current W3C technology. Widely used in configuration files, data exchange, and web services. Not growing for new APIs (JSON preferred) but remains broadly deployed.', 'source': 'https://www.w3.org/XML/'}
notes: Cited as most positive movement toward standardized data sharing; supported by Microsoft, Oracle, SAP, and RosettaNet/OAGI standards bodies.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'CRM applications are a large, growing software category. Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, HubSpot actively developed. Global CRM market exceeds $65B.', 'source': 'General CRM market data'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Supply Chain Management applications are actively used and growing, especially post-pandemic with renewed focus on supply chain resilience. SAP, Oracle, Blue Yonder leading vendors.', 'source': 'General SCM market data'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'e-Procurement applications are actively developed and adopted. Market growing with digital transformation in procurement. Coupa, SAP Ariba, Jaggaer among leaders.', 'source': 'General e-procurement market'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Sales Force Automation (SFA) is an active software category, often integrated into broader CRM platforms. Salesforce, Microsoft, Zoho actively competing.', 'source': 'General SFA market'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Open APIs are fundamental to modern software architecture. API economy is growing; REST, GraphQL, and OpenAPI specification actively developed and adopted.', 'source': 'General API ecosystem'}
